---
title: "Abbey Kealey"
image: images/Abbey_headshot.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  image-width: 20em
  links: 
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/abbey-kealey-405473204/
    - icon: envelope-at
      text: Email
      href: mailto:abbeykealey@gmail.com
      
format:
  html:
    theme: lux
    css: styles.css
    toc: true
---

ABOUT ME

I am currently a Master of Geomatics for Environmental Management (MGEM) student at UBC with a background in environmental and computer science.
